title: ehretia buxifolia var. microphylla
intro: Ehretia buxifolia var. microphylla, also known as the Dwarf Ehretia or Filipino Ehretia, is a shrub or small tree native to the Philippines and other parts of Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ehretia buxifolia var. microphylla include its ability to treat fever, wounds, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and bark are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
